_meta.purpose: Daily Reflection card rotation for EmoCare / Sanctuary Home screen.
_meta.usage: Seed selection by calendar date so the line is stable within a day; rotate on '↻ New reflection' tap. 'sub' is the optional softer second line. Items with "featured": true may be pinned as the first reflection shown to a new user.

reflections.text: Today is not asking you to be perfect.
reflections.sub: It is asking you to be present.

reflections.text: You do not have to carry everything at once.
reflections.sub: One gentle step is enough for today.

reflections.text: The way you speak to yourself matters.
reflections.sub: Offer yourself the same kindness you would offer a friend.

reflections.text: Not every season is meant for growth.
reflections.sub: Some seasons are meant for rest.

reflections.text: You are allowed to move slowly.
reflections.sub: Healing is not a race.

reflections.text: A difficult moment does not define your day.
reflections.sub: It is only one chapter, not the whole story.

reflections.text: What is asking for your attention today?
reflections.sub: What is asking for your compassion?

reflections.text: You have survived every difficult day behind you.
reflections.sub: Trust yourself to meet this one too.

reflections.text: Peace is not the absence of challenge.
reflections.sub: It is the presence of steadiness within it.

reflections.text: Sometimes the bravest thing you can do is pause.
reflections.sub: Stillness is not surrender.

reflections.text: Your worth does not rise and fall with your productivity.
reflections.sub: You matter before you achieve anything.

reflections.text: Notice one thing that feels lighter than it did yesterday.
reflections.sub: Even a small shift is worth honoring.

reflections.text: Growth often looks like returning to yourself.
reflections.sub: Not leaving — coming home.

reflections.text: You do not need perfect words.
reflections.sub: Your truth is enough.

reflections.text: Even small moments of gratitude can soften a heavy day.
reflections.sub: Start with one thing, however quiet.

reflections.text: You are allowed to begin again.
reflections.sub: Every moment is a gentle doorway.

reflections.text: What would happen if you treated yourself with the same kindness you offer others?
reflections.sub: Try it, even for a minute.

reflections.text: Rest is not a reward.
reflections.sub: It is part of being human.

reflections.text: Some answers arrive when the heart becomes quiet enough to hear them.
reflections.sub: You do not have to force clarity today.

reflections.text: Your feelings are visitors.
reflections.sub: Listen to them, but do not let them decide who you are.

reflections.text: There is wisdom in slowing down.
reflections.sub: The world will still be there when you breathe.

reflections.text: What is one thing your heart needs today?
reflections.sub: Not what it should need — what it actually needs.

reflections.text: A softer path is still a path forward.
reflections.sub: Gentle does not mean weak.

reflections.text: The future is built from small moments of courage.
reflections.sub: This may be one of them.

reflections.text: You have permission to let go of what no longer serves you.
reflections.sub: Including the weight of old expectations.

reflections.text: The way forward may not be clear yet.
reflections.sub: Take the next gentle step anyway.

reflections.text: Sometimes progress looks like choosing peace over pressure.
reflections.sub: That counts.

reflections.text: Your presence is enough.
reflections.sub: You do not need to prove your worth today.

reflections.text: A quiet mind begins with a single deep breath.
reflections.sub: You can start there.

reflections.text: May you meet yourself today with patience, understanding, and grace.
reflections.sub: You deserve that from you.

reflections.text: Your body has carried you through every day so far.
reflections.sub: Thank it with a moment of stillness.

reflections.text: You are not behind.
reflections.sub: Your path simply belongs to you.

reflections.text: This feeling will pass through you.
reflections.sub: Nothing heavy stays forever.

reflections.text: Asking for help is not weakness.
reflections.sub: It is its own quiet kind of courage.

reflections.text: Even in your quietest moments, you are not as alone as you feel.
reflections.sub: Reach, if even inward.

reflections.text: Naming a feeling can loosen its hold.
reflections.sub: What would you call this one today?

reflections.text: Not everything needs to be solved today.
reflections.sub: Some things only need to be held.

reflections.text: Let one small thing feel tender today.
reflections.sub: A warm drink, a quiet pause, a kind word.

reflections.text: You are enough exactly as you are.
reflections.sub: Not the version still becoming — the one here now.

reflections.text: Whatever yesterday held,
reflections.sub: today meets you fresh.

reflections.text: You do not have to earn your rest.
reflections.sub: You are already worthy of it.

reflections.text: Some days, showing up is the whole victory.
reflections.sub: That is more than enough.

reflections.text: You are not failing because you feel deeply.
reflections.sub: Depth is not a flaw.

reflections.text: Let this moment be small enough to carry.
reflections.sub: You do not need to hold the whole day at once.

reflections.text: The heart knows things the mind is still catching up to.
reflections.sub: Trust the quiet knowing.

reflections.text: You can hold hope and exhaustion in the same breath.
reflections.sub: Both are allowed here.

reflections.text: There is no wrong way to feel today.
reflections.sub: Your emotions do not need fixing first.

reflections.text: You deserve the same patience you give everyone else.
reflections.sub: Turn a little of it inward.

reflections.text: Not knowing is also a place to begin.
reflections.sub: Uncertainty can be gentle too.

reflections.text: Light finds you even on heavy days.
reflections.sub: Look for the smallest glow.

reflections.text: You are allowed to outgrow what once protected you.
reflections.sub: Letting go can be an act of care.

reflections.text: One honest feeling is braver than a thousand polite ones.
reflections.sub: Your truth matters here.

reflections.text: Today can be ordinary and still be enough.
reflections.sub: Not every day needs to be remarkable.

reflections.text: Maybe the answer today is simply: enough for now.
reflections.sub: That is a complete answer.

reflections.text: What if today asked less of you, not more?
reflections.sub: Permission granted.
